description: CompositionCharcoal grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed neckline and has a graphic and flock print combination on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print Let  your mischievious attitude rub off on your gang with this round neck t-shirt from mr. men. While the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, the Mr. Mischief graphic with the flock print detailing adds an element of interest. A great casual wear, this T-shirt looks best with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.1', Shoulders- "
